name: Etebar
overview: "Amin Tajik is a middle-aged and trusted local man who owns a carpet factory and works for a charity that is dedicated to releasing prisoners of unintentional crimes. All the money collected for the charity is deposited into Amin Tajik's account, and on the day he is supposed to release the prisoners, his accounts are blocked and he himself is imprisoned on charges of financial corruption. In prison, Amin meets a young man named Saeed, whose father has tried many times to release him, but each time Amin adds another person to the list instead of him, and
